# ProbateSwift ‚Äî Harness Index

> **2026-06-12 build (plan `expressive-chasing-galaxy`):** shipped the self-serve launch slice ‚Äî Stripe
> checkout (¬£295, gated at submission), the guided 7-phase task list, real document upload, and PDF
> form-fill (PA1P, "prefill + guide" v1). Code-complete, `npm run build` green, guided-task logic
> unit-tested. **Not yet live:** needs `db:push` (new `payments`, `case_tasks` tables) + Stripe keys +
> staging verification. IHT400/PA1A field mappings are the next extension (inventories exist).

Generated rollup of `harness/` nodes. Strategy layer built by harness-discovery (2026-06-03);
delivery layer (solutions/decisions + opportunity `delivery:` verdicts) added by harness-builder
(2026-06-03) from the codebase. **2026-06-11:** David resolved the three open `needs_user_input`
items (pricing model, IHT form strategy, checkout) and added the browser-autofill solution idea.

## Graph tree (Problem ‚Üí Opportunity ‚Üí Solution ‚Üí Decision)

- **Vision** ‚Äî Affordable, personalised, self-serve probate for England & Wales `[vision]` ‚úÖ approved
- **Goals** ‚Äî coverage end-to-end ¬∑ paying customers ¬∑ lower time & cost `[goals]` ‚úÖ approved
- **Market** ‚Äî UK E&W probate & estate administration `[market]`

Problems ‚Üí Opportunities ‚Üí Solutions (‚óè=in code ‚óã=candidate/not built) ‚Üí Decisions:

- `prob-dont-know-if-needed` ‚Äî Don't know if probate is needed / eligible
- `prob-when-solicitor-needed` ‚Äî No clear signal a case is too complex
  - ‚Üí `opp-guided-triage` ‚Äî Personalised triage **[delivery: built]**
    - ‚óè `sol-rule-flag-engine` ‚Äî Deterministic eligibility & flag engine
    - ‚óè `sol-personalised-task-list` ‚Äî Tasks generated from flags
    - ‚óã `sol-llm-triage` ‚Äî LLM conversational triage (alternative)
    - ‚öñ `dec-rule-engine-vs-llm-triage` ‚Äî chose rule engine over LLM
    - ‚öñ `dec-assessment-seeding` ‚Äî landing assessment seeds in-app evaluation **(superseded)**
    - ‚öñ `dec-customer-journey-intake` ‚Äî **merged intake, hybrid triage, helper handoff (user-decided 2026-06-11)**
    - ‚öñ `dec-lifecycle-scope` ‚Äî **full lifecycle to distribution; IHT400 primary path (user-decided 2026-06-11)**

- `prob-stopped-applications` ‚Äî Avoidable errors get applications stopped
- `prob-iht-forms-complexity` ‚Äî IHT400 & schedules not fit for laypeople
  - ‚Üí `opp-presubmission-validation` ‚Äî Pre-submission validation **[delivery: partial]**
    - ‚óè `sol-readiness-gate` ‚Äî Blockers & missing-requirements gate
    - ‚óè `sol-rule-flag-engine`, ‚óè `sol-personalised-task-list`
  - ‚Üí `opp-iht-form-assistant` ‚Äî Guided IHT-form completion **[delivery: partial ‚Äî PA1P built 2026-06-12]**
    - ‚óê `sol-guided-iht400` ‚Äî Guided completion w/ prefill ‚Üí completed PDFs. **v1 built: PA1P fill** (pdf-lib, `server/services/formFiller.ts`, gated behind payment); IHT400/PA1A mappings next (inventories ready)
    - ‚óè `sol-iht-flagging-bundled-forms` ‚Äî IHT routing + bundled GOV.UK PDFs (current, superseded as v1 target)
    - ‚óã `sol-pa1p-browser-autofill` ‚Äî Chrome extension autofills GOV.UK online probate (fast PA1P route)
    - ‚öñ `dec-iht-form-strategy` ‚Äî **resolved**: fill-for-you (PDFs, not e-filing); IHT400 paper-only, PA1P via PDF or extension

- `prob-emotional-admin-burden` ‚Äî Death admin exhausting & fragmented
  - ‚Üí `opp-estate-dashboard` ‚Äî Track assets/people/docs/tasks **[delivery: built]**
    - ‚óè `sol-estate-dashboard` ‚Äî Cases/people/assets/liabilities/docs/tasks
    - ‚óè `sol-doc-ai-extraction` ‚Äî Gemini auto-populate from uploads
    - ‚óè `sol-milestone-gamification` ‚Äî Game-like milestone progression
    - ‚óè `sol-guided-tasklist-ux` ‚Äî Generated, linear-feel 7-phase task list **(built 2026-06-12: `computeGuidedView`, `case_tasks`, `GuidedTaskList.tsx`)**
    - ‚öñ `dec-doc-ai-gemini` ‚Äî chose Gemini 2.0 Flash for extraction

- `prob-cost-of-professionals` ‚Äî Professional probate expensive / opaque
  - ‚Üí `opp-flat-fee-positioning` ‚Äî Low flat fee vs % pricing **[delivery: built 2026-06-12]**
    - ‚óè `sol-flat-fee-checkout` ‚Äî single SKU ¬£295, gated at submission **(built: Stripe Checkout, `payments` table, `/api/payments/*` + webhook, `canPay`-gated)**
    - ‚öñ `dec-pricing-model` ‚Äî **resolved**: ¬£295 flat (committed, acquisition-first) ¬∑ charge at submission ¬∑ one paid SKU (no free tier)

Infrastructure decisions (no direct opportunity): `dec-auth-clerk` (Clerk over Stytch/Replit),
`dec-hosting-railway` (Railway over Replit).

Competitors (context, pricing refreshed 2026-06-11): `comp-govuk-diy` (~¬£316 DIY),
`comp-budget-grant-services` (¬£195‚Äì¬£355 floor), `comp-octopus-legacy` (grant ¬£585 no-IHT / ¬£1,290 with
IHT forms / full admin ¬£2,730+ ‚Äî primary threat), `comp-farewill` (Essential ~¬£595‚Äì¬£895; Complete ¬£1,500), `comp-kings-court-trust`
(full admin ¬£2,340+, avg ¬£4,190‚Äì¬£7,321), `comp-coop-legal` (~2.5‚Äì4% of estate),
`comp-banks-percentage` (2‚Äì4% of estate).

## Resolved 2026-06-11 (David) ‚Äî now `ready_for_review`, promote to `approved` when happy
- **`dec-pricing-model`** ‚Äî **¬£295 flat, committed** (acquisition-first; price test deferred until there's a user
  base). Charge **at submission** (free to use until then). **One paid SKU, no separate free tier.**
- **`dec-iht-form-strategy`** ‚Äî Chose **fill-for-you** (`sol-guided-iht400`). "Fill" = **output completed PDFs**, not
  e-filing: **IHT400 is paper-only** (print, wet-sign, post); **PA1P** online service has no API, so either prefill the
  paper PA1P PDF or use a **Chrome extension** to autofill the GOV.UK service (`sol-pa1p-browser-autofill`, David's idea).
  Optional print-and-post fulfilment as an upsell.
- **`sol-flat-fee-checkout`** ‚Äî Model settled (single SKU, gated at submission); checkout still to build, price number TBD.

## Open follow-ups (build/validation, not blocking)
- Sequence the PA1P route: paper-PDF first vs browser-extension as a fast-route upgrade.
- Decide print-and-post: v1 or later upsell. Legal/liability review of generating signable form content.

- `sol-llm-triage` (alternative not built), `sol-flat-fee-checkout` (price number untested),
  `sol-pa1p-browser-autofill` (idea, not built), `dec-pricing-model` (price number untested).
